subcodes.first_line: O thou handmaid of God! Do thou establish a heavenly school and be thou a teacher in that house of learning. Educate the children in the things of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله دبستان تعلیم روحانی باز کن و ادیب دارالتعلیم رحمانی شو و اطفال را
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @humility; meekness; lowliness
